message:
feat(layout): Add Flex layout solver and terminal_writer fixes

- Add Flex layout container with direction, constraints, margin, gap,
  and alignment support
- Implement Constraint variants: Fixed, Percentage, Min, Max, Ratio
- Add solve() method for computing layout rectangles
- Fix terminal_writer tests to use Cursor<Vec<u8>> properly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
